title: median function breaks when the column contains NULL values
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_median ( id INTEGER IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, value DOUBLE, category VARCHAR(50) );
UPDATE test_median SET value = NULL WHERE category = 'A';
SELECT AVG(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_median WHERE category = 'B' AND value IS NOT NULL) AS subquery;
SELECT AVG(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_median WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS subquery;
key_bug_features: median function fails with NULL values in column
